nodes.name: Agency Search Flow
nodes.summary: Public search validates consulting type settings, checks postcode minimum length, applies topic/demographic feature gates, queries agency tables, shuffles matches, and falls back to white-spot agency settings when no match exists.

nodes.name: Admin Agency Lifecycle
nodes.summary: Admin users create, update, soft-delete, change agency type, and manage postcode ranges. The flow touches validation, tenant ownership, topics, user-admin consultant adaptation, Matrix provisioning, and AppointmentService sync.

nodes.name: Tenant Context
nodes.summary: When multitenancy is enabled, request filters resolve a tenant from token claims, technical role, tenant header, subdomain, or single-domain settings; repository calls then receive Hibernate tenant filters unless marked tenant-unaware.

nodes.name: ORISO Peer Service Clients
nodes.summary: OpenAPI generator creates RestTemplate clients for UserAdminService, ConsultingTypeService, TenantService, TopicService, ApplicationSettingsService, and AppointmentService.

nodes.name: Matrix Agency Account
nodes.summary: Agency creation/provisioning can create or rotate a Synapse account and persist the resulting Matrix user ID and password on the agency row.

nodes.name: agency
nodes.summary: Core agency master data, tenant ownership, demographics, data-protection fields, Matrix credentials, soft deletion, and agency logo.

nodes.name: agency_postcode_range
nodes.summary: Postcode interval records used to match public registration/search requests to agencies.

nodes.name: agency_topic
nodes.summary: Join table connecting agencies to topic IDs from TopicService.

tour.title: Start With Purpose And Contracts
tour.description: Read the root README/readme and both inbound OpenAPI contracts to understand the public lookup and admin lifecycle surfaces.

tour.title: Find The Runtime Entry Points
tour.description: Review bootstrap, base properties, Maven build, and Dockerfile to understand how the service starts, generates code, and is packaged.

tour.title: Trace Public Agency Lookup
tour.description: Follow getAgencies from the contract to AgencyController, AgencyService, consulting-type validation, tenant-aware repository queries, and white-spot fallback.

tour.title: Trace Admin Agency Lifecycle
tour.description: Walk admin CRUD and type-change requests through AgencyAdminController, validation, AgencyAdminService, topic merge, Matrix provisioning, UserAdminService, and AppointmentService sync.

tour.title: Understand Security And Tenant Context
tour.description: Read SecurityConfig, JwtAuthConverter, authority mapping, HttpTenantFilter, TenantResolverService, and TenantAspect.

tour.title: Map Persistence And Schema
tour.description: Connect Agency, AgencyPostcodeRange, AgencyTopic, repositories, native queries, and Liquibase changelogs to MariaDB schema.

tour.title: Review Peer Integrations
tour.description: Inspect generated client factories and adapters for UserAdmin, ConsultingType, Tenant, Topic, ApplicationSettings, Appointment, and Matrix Synapse.
